zh.Minster Abbey, Minster, Kent, England: 英國英格蘭肯特明斯特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John de Northwode於1328年出生在英國艾可布萊崔時，他的父親Roger de Northwode21歲，母親Juliana de Saye20歲。他於1350年與Joan Hart在英國英格蘭諾福爾可阿申維爾索普結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1378年2月27日在英國肯特易斯爾 本 謝坡享年50歲，埋葬在英國肯特明斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John de Northwode于1328年出生在英国艾可布萊崔时，他的父亲Roger de Northwode21岁，母亲Juliana de Saye20岁。他于1350年与Joan Hart在英国英格兰諾福爾可阿申維爾索普结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1378年2月27日在英国肯特易斯爾 本 謝坡享年50岁，埋葬在英国肯特明斯特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John de Northwode was born in 1328, in Braintree, Essex, England, his father, Roger de Northwode, was 21 and his mother, Juliana de Saye, was 20. He married Joan Hart in 1350, in Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 27 February 1378, in Isle of Sheppey, Kent, England, at the age of 50, and was buried in Minster, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John de Northwode est né en 1328, à Braintree, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Roger de Northwode, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Juliana de Saye, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Joan Hart en 1350, à Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 27 février 1378, à Isle of Sheppey, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à Minster, Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John de Northwode 1328 in Braintree, Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger de Northwode 21 und seine Mutter Juliana de Saye 20. Er hat 1350 in Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Joan Hart geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 27. Februar 1378 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Isle of Sheppey, Kent, England und wurde in Minster, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de Northwode è nato il nel 1328 nel Braintree, Essex, England, il suo padre, Roger de Northwode, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Juliana de Saye, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Joan Hart nel 1350, nel Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 27 febbraio 1378, nel Isle of Sheppey, Kent, England, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolto a Minster, Kent, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John de Northwodeが1328年にイギリスエセックスブレイントレで生まれた時，父Roger de Northwodeは21歳，母Juliana de Sayeは20歳であった。1350年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクアシュウエルソルペでJoan Hartと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1378年2月27日にイギリスケントイスル オフ シェッピーで50歳で死去し，イギリスケントミンスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John de Northwode(이)가 1328년 영국 에세스 브레이트리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger de Northwode(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Juliana de Saye(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1350년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 애슈웰소에서 Joan Hart(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1378년 2월 27일 영국 켄트 이슬일 프 셰프피에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 민스터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de Northwode nasceu em 1328, em Braintree, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger de Northwode, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Juliana de Saye, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Hart em 1350, em Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 27 de fevereiro de 1378, em Isle of Sheppey, Kent, Inglaterra, com 50 anos, e foi sepultado em Minster, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John de Northwode родился в 1328 г. в местности бреинтри, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Roger de Northwode было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Juliana de Saye, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Hart в 1350 г. в местности ашвеллтаурп, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 27 февраля 1378 г. в местности исл оф шеппи, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности минстир, кэнт, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John de Northwode nació en 1328, en Braintree, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger de Northwode, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Juliana de Saye, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Joan Hart en 1350, en Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 27 de febrero de 1378, en Isle of Sheppey, Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultado en Minster, Kent, Inglaterra.
